phrases.intent_en: Ask when the market is open
phrases.text_local: À quelle heure ouvre le marché ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel UHR OO-vreh luh mar-SHAY
phrases.cultural_note: Les Halles is open Tuesday to Sunday, with the best selection Saturday morning. It's closed on Monday.

responses.phonetic: duh set uhr trahnt ah kah-torz uhr. fair-MAY luh luhn-DEE
responses.french: De sept heures trente à quatorze heures. Fermé le lundi.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find local ham
phrases.text_local: Où puis-je trouver du jambon de Bayonne ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo PWEE-zhuh troo-VAY doo zham-BON duh bah-YOHN
phrases.cultural_note: Bayonne ham is a protected designation cured ham from the Basque country, available at market stalls.

responses.english: At the charcuterie stand, at the back on the left.
responses.phonetic: oh stahnd duh shar-koo-tuh-REE, oh fohn ah GOHSH
responses.french: Au stand de charcuterie, au fond à gauche.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a café in the market
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un café dans le marché ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL uhn kah-FAY dahn luh mar-SHAY
phrases.cultural_note: The market has small bars and cafes where you can enjoy pintxos (Basque tapas) with a coffee or glass of wine.

responses.english: Yes, there's a small bar in the center of the market.
responses.phonetic: wee, eel ee ah uhn puh-TEE bar oh SAHN-truh doo mar-SHAY
responses.french: Oui, il y a un petit bar au centre du marché.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find local cheese
phrases.text_local: Où puis-je trouver du fromage local ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo PWEE-zhuh troo-VAY doo froh-MAHZH lo-KAL
phrases.cultural_note: Look for Ossau-Iraty, a PDO sheep's milk cheese from the Pyrenees. It's excellent with local honey or in a cheese course.

responses.english: The cheese shops are at the back of the market. Ask for Ossau-Iraty.
responses.phonetic: lay froh-mahzh-REE son oh fohn day AL. duh-mahn-DAY loh-SOH ee-rah-TEE
responses.french: Les fromageries sont au fond des Halles. Demandez l'Ossau-Iraty.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if they accept credit cards
phrases.cultural_note: Smaller market stalls often prefer cash. Larger vendors may accept cards.

responses.english: It depends on the stand. Bring some cash.
responses.phonetic: sah day-PAHN doo stahnd. pray-vwah-YAY doo lee-KEED
responses.french: Ça dépend du stand. Prévoyez du liquide.
